subject: acsec exposure draft on proposed statement of position

emails.subject: AcSEC Exposure Draft on Proposed Statement of Position
emails.subject_base: AcSEC Exposure Draft on Proposed Statement of Position
emails.body: AcSEC Exposure Draft on Proposed Statement of Position Rod: Attached are AGA comments concerning the Exposure Draft of the Proposed Statement of Position. Are you following this issue or planning on filing comments? Comment letter deadline is November 15, 2001.

emails.subject: RE: AcSEC Exposure Draft on Proposed Statement of Position
emails.subject_base: AcSEC Exposure Draft on Proposed Statement of Position
emails.body: RE: AcSEC Exposure Draft on Proposed Statement of Position WE are following the issue and I believe INGAA is going to be filing somethiong that we have had input on. To: Hayslett, Rod

emails.subject: RE: AcSEC Exposure Draft on Proposed Statement of Position

emails.body: Here it is, it is not yet in final form. To: Hayslett, Rod
